title: The Big Picture Dry Bulk Fundamentals
section_path: The Big Picture Dry Bulk Fundamentals
section_path_text: The Big Picture Dry Bulk Fundamentals
summary:
Main
By Nick Ristic
Covid and dry bulk
While the pandemic has had a catastrophic effect on most markets, dry bulk demand seems to have fared relatively well. In March, we saw supply chain disruption and port closures, but those have since dissipated, and in terms of prices, many of the key dry bulk commodities have outperformed other goods. This is in part down to supply disruptions (particularly in the case of iron ore) but is also due to sustained demand for raw materials and ‘essential' goods, such as grains.
